---
title: "Unit 8 - Probability"
---

> This unit focuses more on the theory behind how we make the inferences that we do. A little more theory and background than before. 

## October 24, 2024

Going old school with a PowerPoint
[Probability Slides](Unit8_Probability-Inferences.pptx)

[Coin Flip R-Script](Coin Flip.Rmd)
